Tool name: calc_heat_capacity
Tool description: Calculate the heat capacity at constant pressure of air using its temperature and volume.
Skill condition: multi_candidate_skill
Skill summary: Calculate the heat capacity at constant pressure of air using its temperature and volume. Provide all required fields: `temp`, and `volume`.
When to use: ["Use `calc_heat_capacity` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.", "Provide all required fields: `temp`, and `volume`."]
When not to use: ["Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.", "Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.", "Do not use when required inputs are missing."]
Argument template: {"temp": 1, "volume": 1, "gas": "sample_gas_1"}
Examples: [{"scenario": "Minimal valid request that satisfies the required fields for calc_heat_capacity", "arguments": {"temp": 1, "volume": 1}}, {"scenario": "Richer invocation that uses optional controls for calc_heat_capacity", "arguments": {"temp": 2, "volume": 2, "gas": "sample_gas_2"}}]
Schema: {"properties": {"gas": {"description": "Type of gas, with air as default.", "type": "string"}, "temp": {"description": "The temperature of the gas in Kelvin.", "type": "integer"}, "volume": {"description": "The volume of the gas in m^3.", "type": "integer"}}, "required": ["temp", "volume"], "type": "object"}
